description_long: This object is a modern computer monitor with a wide, slightly curved display and a thin, black bezel framing the screen. The front surface is dominated by the large, glossy display area, while the back features a prominent central support column with visible structural elements and a square, flat base for stability. The monitor's rear panel displays the ASUS brand logo in a light color, contrasting against the dark matte finish. The stand appears robust and may offer height adjustment, as suggested by the segmented design of the support column. No physical buttons or ports are visible on the front, sides, or rear in the provided views. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or gaming environments.
description: A sleek, wide-screen ASUS computer monitor with a thin black bezel, curved display, and a sturdy, segmented central stand on a flat square base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved display with a thin black bezel and a flat square base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the segmented, cylindrical support column attached to the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ASUS logo, the segmented central support, and the flat base; no ports or buttons are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the monitor and the structure of the support column.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a sleek, modern appearance with sharp corners and a smooth matte finish, providing minimal distraction around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a central, segmented cylindrical column attached to a flat, square base, likely made of plastic and metal, suggesting possible height adjustment.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any edge or panel in the provided views.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS brand logo is visible on the rear panel, centered near the top in a light color, and another smaller logo is present on the left side of the rear.
